issues.description: Trigger should be 'Counter' not 'OnAttacked'. This is a Counter card effect.
Target should specify 'Leader or Character' (LeaderOrCharacter scope), not just ChooseOwnCharacter
GiveDon action missing condition. Should only trigger 'if you have 2 or less Life cards' (condition: LifeCount <= 2)
Duplicate/malformed second effect with trigger 'Trigger'. The entire effect should be single trigger with conditional action.
GiveDon action missing 'rest' property. Card text says 'rest it' - should include rest:true
